description: Synthetic meeting corpus for transcript, summary, action-item, and cross-meeting insight tasks.

meetings.title: Q2 Roadmap Review
meetings.summary: Reviewed roadmap priorities, flagged analytics migration risk, and aligned on mobile onboarding milestones.
transcript_snippets: Ava: We should not ship onboarding before the analytics migration risk is understood.
Chloe: Mobile onboarding can still proceed if we decouple the event pipeline.

meetings.title: Customer Feedback Sync
meetings.summary: Summarized enterprise feedback around reporting speed, audit logs, and search precision.
transcript_snippets: Evan: Reporting speed is still the biggest blocker for enterprise admins.
Farah: Search feels close, but precision drops when customers query across multiple workspaces.

meetings.title: Weekly Product Standup
meetings.summary: Shared launch blockers, discussed flaky integrations, and reviewed experiment readouts.
transcript_snippets: Hiro: Our biggest blocker is still flaky third-party retries.
Dina: We need a cleaner summary of experiment wins before the launch review.

meetings.title: Sales Enablement Review
meetings.summary: Reviewed objections from prospects, discussed pricing confusion, and planned a refreshed demo narrative.
transcript_snippets: Jon: Prospects keep asking whether the audit layer is included in the base plan.
Kira: The demo narrative needs to lead with admin trust and rollout speed.
